controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.gap: Not implemented across all critical and privileged systems.
controls.recommendation: Enable MFA for all users, especially administrators and privileged accounts.

controls.name: Role-Based Access Control
controls.gap: Access permissions are not reviewed regularly against user roles.
controls.recommendation: Perform periodic access reviews and apply least privilege consistently.

controls.name: Security Awareness Training
controls.gap: Training is only provided during induction with no recurring awareness programme.
controls.recommendation: Deliver regular awareness sessions and phishing simulation exercises.

controls.name: Cloud Security Configuration Reviews
controls.gap: No formal review process exists for cloud misconfiguration monitoring.
controls.recommendation: Implement scheduled cloud configuration reviews and automated monitoring.

controls.name: User Activity Logging
controls.gap: Logging exists but is not centralised and lacks real-time alerting.
controls.recommendation: Adopt centralised logging and monitoring for suspicious behaviour detection.

controls.name: System Redundancy and Maintenance
controls.gap: Further resilience testing could improve confidence in continuity controls.
controls.recommendation: Maintain redundancy testing and strengthen incident response readiness.

controls.name: Backup and Restore Procedures
controls.gap: Backups are in place but restoration testing is not performed regularly.
controls.recommendation: Automate and test backup restoration procedures on a scheduled basis.
